languages.text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."
languages.original_text: "Уровень освещения экстремально низок. Нунциус, будь любезен, активируй люмен. Лучше видеть то, что скрыто во тьме — сколь бы неприглядным оно ни было".

traits.locale_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."
"Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."
"Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."
"Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

languages.text: "Уровень освещения экстремально низок. Нунциус, будь любезен, активируй люмен. Лучше видеть то, что скрыто во тьме — сколь бы неприглядным оно ни было".
"Lichtniveau kritisch. Nuncius, wärt Ihr bitte so freundlich, das Lumen zu aktivieren. Es ist besser, zu sehen, was im Dunklen verborgen ist, egal, wie unansehnlich es auch sein mag."
languages.original_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

traits.locale_text: "Lichtniveau kritisch. Nuncius, wärt Ihr bitte so freundlich, das Lumen zu aktivieren. Es ist besser, zu sehen, was im Dunklen verborgen ist, egal, wie unansehnlich es auch sein mag."

languages.text: « Le taux d'éclairage atteint un niveau critique. Nuncius, aurais-tu l'amabilité d'activer le lumen ? Je préfère savoir ce qui est tapi dans l'ombre, même si cette vision est susceptible de me répugner. »
languages.original_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

traits.locale_text: « Le taux d'éclairage atteint un niveau critique. Nuncius, aurais-tu l'amabilité d'activer le lumen ? Je préfère savoir ce qui est tapi dans l'ombre, même si cette vision est susceptible de me répugner. »

languages.text: «Niveles de iluminación críticos. Nuncius, si tiene la bondad, active el lumen. Es mejor ver lo que se oculta en la oscuridad, por desagradable que resulte».
languages.original_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

traits.locale_text: «Niveles de iluminación críticos. Nuncius, si tiene la bondad, active el lumen. Es mejor ver lo que se oculta en la oscuridad, por desagradable que resulte».

languages.text: "Aydınlatma seviyeleri kritik derecede düşük. Nuncius, rica etsem lümeni etkinleştirir misin? Nahoş olsa bile karanlıkta saklanan her neyse görmek daha iyidir."
languages.original_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

traits.locale_text: "Aydınlatma seviyeleri kritik derecede düşük. Nuncius, rica etsem lümeni etkinleştirir misin? Nahoş olsa bile karanlıkta saklanan her neyse görmek daha iyidir."

languages.text: “照明水平严重不足。努恩修斯，有劳你激活流明灯。黑暗中藏着什么，还是要看个分明才好，无论它有多么不堪入目。”
languages.original_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

traits.locale_text: “照明水平严重不足。努恩修斯，有劳你激活流明灯。黑暗中藏着什么，还是要看个分明才好，无论它有多么不堪入目。”

languages.text: 照明レベルが非常に低い。ヌンシウス、もし可能であれば、ルーメンを起動してくれ。どんなに醜くても、暗闇に隠れているものを確認するほうが良い。
languages.original_text: "Lighting levels are critically low. Nuncius, if you would be so kind, activate the lumen. It is better to see what is hidden in the dark, however unsightly it may be."

traits.locale_text: 照明レベルが非常に低い。ヌンシウス、もし可能であれば、ルーメンを起動してくれ。どんなに醜くても、暗闇に隠れているものを確認するほうが良い。
